# Suggested GitHub Labels

GitHub does not create labels from this file automatically.
Use it as a quick reference when configuring the repository labels.

## Type

- `type:bug`
- `type:docs`
- `type:feedback`
- `type:mvp`
- `type:refactor`
- `type:research`
- `type:test`

## Area

- `area:runtime`
- `area:memory`
- `area:metainfo`
- `area:node-3`
- `area:node-4`
- `area:docs`
- `area:github`
- `area:onboarding`

## Status

- `status:needs-design`
- `status:needs-triage`
- `status:blocked`
- `status:ready`

## Priority

- `priority:p1`
- `priority:p2`
- `priority:p3`

## Community

- `help wanted`
- `good first issue`
- `question`
- `design`
